title: erigeron foliosus var. hartwegii
intro: Erigeron foliosus var. hartwegii, also known as Hartweg's daisy or California fleabane, is a perennial herb in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Erigeron foliosus var. hartwegii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
